examples: Passengers for Lanzhou alight at Nanjing.
The liner flew straight [directly] to Nanjing.
There are lots of excellent sights in Nanjing.
Singapore staged the first competition in 2010 and the next is in Nanjing, China, in 2014.
Yangtse Evening Post reports "severe" air pollution in Nanjing and other major cities of eastern Jiangsu province.
